seoTitle: Granville vs Grass Patch — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Granville and Grass Patch. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Granville vs Grass Patch: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Granville and Grass Patch.
heading: Granville vs Grass Patch — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Granville, Western Australia and Grass Patch, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Grass Patch has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Granville (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Granville or Grass Patch safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Granville has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Grass Patch scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Granville scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Grass Patch scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Granville or Grass Patch?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Grass Patch has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
